cases.description: Called by guided-execution after a step validates
cases.prompt: Step 3 (configure PostgreSQL connection) is complete — document it
expectations: Includes all 11 sections or marks them N/A
Produces a Reusable Guide section that can be followed standalone

cases.description: Standalone retroactive documentation triggers the skill
cases.prompt: document what we just did as a reusable guide for the team
expectations: Quality checklist: commands are exact and reproducible

cases.description: First step of a new workflow triggers directory setup
cases.prompt: document step 1 of the staging-deploy workflow
expectations: Writes a README.md index with workflow title + status
Adds the new step to the README index table

cases.description: README request does NOT trigger step-documenter
cases.prompt: write a README for this repo

cases.description: Daily work log does NOT trigger step-documenter
expectations: Does NOT create a step doc in docs/executions/
